channel.title: Blender on Xhuljano
channel.description: Recent content in Blender on Xhuljano

item.title: How I Built a 3D Earth Hero With an AI Agent Doing the Actual Work
item.description: I directed. Hermes executed. Together we built a cinematic Earth+Moon animation in Blender 5.1 using NASA textures and 218 MCP tools — from a blank scene to a deployed portfolio hero.

item.title: The Bug That Took 218 Tools and Made Them All Useless
item.description: Blender registered all 218 MCP tools successfully. Every single one timed out. Here’s the root cause, the dead giveaway, and the threaded fix.
